initial_draft:
```
<my name> Player BLUE </my name>
<my resources> X: 5, Y: 25 </my resources>
<my goals> Acquire as many resources as possible </my goals>
<reason> The other player is proposing a trade where they give 8 itemX and want 5 itemY. I have 25 itemY and they have 8 itemX. I can afford to give them 5 itemY, and I will gain 8 itemX. This seems like a good deal as I am acquiring resources. Since this is the last round, I should accept this offer. </reason>
<player answer> ACCEPT </player answer>
<message> Accepting the trade. </message>
<newly proposed trade> NONE </newly proposed trade>
```

iterations.feedback:

```
4. Consistency: OK. The reason, player answer, and message are all consistent with accepting the trade.
5. Rule compliance: OK. This is the last round, and I'm accepting, so no proposal budget concerns.
</critique>
```
